title: File IO: read a CSV/Excel upload through the supported reader APIs
instruction: In the sandbox model, read an uploaded data file the supported way. Ground it first with get_knowledge(topic="file-readers"). Create a class DemoFileImporter with public static methods: (1) `container readCsv(System.IO.Stream _stream)` - parses the stream with CommaStreamIo (never with a hand-rolled strSplit over a text line), skips the header row, and returns the rows as a packed container; (2) `container readExcel(System.IO.Stream _stream)` - reads the first worksheet through the OpenXML SpreadsheetDocument/WorkbookPart path taught by the knowledge entry; (3) `void importRows(container _rows)` - inserts the parsed rows into ConDemoNoteHeader inside ttsbegin/ttscommit with a RecordInsertList. Reading from a server file path with a raw AsciiIo FAILS this case: the file arrives as a stream from the browser upload. Confirm every reader class and member signature with search/get_method before writing it - do not guess. The class must build with zero BP errors.
